title: Chronos drive recording card
validations: npx.cmd eslint modules/chronos/ChronosPage.tsx modules/chronos/components/chronos-drive-recording-card.tsx --max-warnings 0 em apps/hub: PASS com warning conhecido MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON do Node
npm.cmd run check-types:hub: PASS apos extracao do card de gravacao do Drive Chronos
npm.cmd run lint:hub: PASS com warning conhecido MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON do Node em apps/hub/eslint.config.js
npm.cmd run build --workspace @repo/hub: PASS com warning conhecido Turbopack/NFT sobre trace de engineering-operations-source.ts
smoke HTTP local em servidor ja ativo http://127.0.0.1:3001: /chronos 200, /chronos/lideranca 200, /hermes 200, /hades 200 e /iris 200
smoke HTTP local sem sessao para /api/chronos/meetings, /api/chronos/google-calendar/status e /api/chronos/invitees?q=lu: PASS 401 esperado
rg @ts-nocheck e rg eslint-disable em apps/hub/modules/chronos/components/chronos-drive-recording-card.tsx e apps/hub/modules/chronos/ChronosPage.tsx: PASS, sem supressoes
git diff --check nos arquivos do recorte: PASS com avisos esperados LF/CRLF
sem endpoint novo, banco, env, secret, token, Vercel, Supabase admin, Preview, homologacao ou producao
rollback: Reverter apps/hub/modules/chronos/components/chronos-drive-recording-card.tsx e reintroduzir ChronosDriveMeetingRecordingCard e ChronosDriveRecordingActions em apps/hub/modules/chronos/ChronosPage.tsx.
Nao ha DDL, env, deploy, endpoint novo, alias, dominio ou mudanca de integracao real associada.
notes: Extrai card de reuniao com gravacao e acoes de assistir, baixar, selecionar reuniao e transcrever para apps/hub/modules/chronos/components/chronos-drive-recording-card.tsx.
Preserva modos grid/list, badges de status, data/hora, participantes, duracao, tamanho, arquivos disponiveis e fluxo de transcricao local/persistida.
ChronosPage.tsx passa a consumir o card dedicado sem alterar filtros, dados, permissao, endpoints ou integracoes.
Nao altera OpenAI, Google Calendar, storage, schema, env, token, Vercel, Supabase admin, Preview, homologacao ou producao.
